lint.command: echo "Checkstyle in advisory mode (49962 pre-existing violations). Skipped as hard gate."

blockingIssues.description: Accounting decomposition objective was not achieved: legacy logic remains concentrated in a 5703-line AccountingCoreService and new services mostly proxy calls.
Factory/production journal flows still bypass createStandardJournal(JournalCreationRequest) via legacy AccountingFacade methods (postMaterialConsumption, postLaborOverheadApplied, postSimpleJournal).
Company stateCode was added to the entity but not exposed in company create/update APIs, preventing reliable intra/inter-state GST decisioning in runtime flows.
GST reconciliation input tax credit overstates eligible credit because purchase-return reductions are not accounted for in reconciliation calculation.
Supplier auto-settle can fail for amount-only requests because optional reference/idempotency fields are passed through to a downstream path that requires one of them.
Bank reconciliation discrepancy is computed against current ledger balance rather than period-bounded ledger balance, producing incorrect historical statement variance.
Supplier settlement journals use SUP-* references and are not classified as settlement-specific audit actions, leaving settlement audit typing incomplete.
Frontend handoff leaves a placeholder for ConfigurationHealthReport instead of a concrete response contract, violating complete DTO documentation requirements.
Paginated DTO shapes are incorrectly documented by flattening item fields at top level instead of PageResponse wrapper fields (content/totalElements/totalPages/page/size).

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Resolve contradictory guidance on .factory edits by explicitly allowing `.factory/library/frontend-handoff.md` updates when features change APIs while still prohibiting mission-infrastructure file edits.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Multiple reviews observed conflict between AGENTS off-limits guidance and backend-worker requirements that mandate frontend handoff updates in .factory/library.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: For decomposition features, add explicit acceptance checks beyond file creation: enforce no replacement monolith class >500 lines and require moved domain logic ownership in target services (not pass-through delegates).
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: decompose-accounting-service created the requested service files but kept almost all logic in AccountingCoreService (5703 lines), and wrapper services delegated into that class.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: When a feature mandates standardization via a specific facade/DTO path, require repository-wide call-site verification grep assertions proving no bypass paths remain.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: standardize-journal-creation-flows introduced standard APIs, but production/factory paths still used legacy posting methods bypassing createStandardJournal.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Include actionable skill adherence telemetry (step-level event trace and skillFeedback) in transcript skeletons/handoffs so scrutiny can reliably validate TDD/procedure compliance.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Several reviews noted compact transcript skeletons and missing skillFeedback details, limiting confidence in procedural conformance checks.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add frontend-handoff contract validation checklist that explicitly verifies paginated wrapper schema shapes and forbids unresolved placeholder schemas before feature completion.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: accounting-frontend-handoff-doc documented endpoint coverage well but still shipped blocking schema-shape and placeholder DTO contract errors.

rejectedObservations.observation: Repeated reports that AGENTS and skills conflict on event-driven vs direct-call accounting journal flows.
rejectedObservations.reason: Feature-specific exception already encoded in milestone requirements; captured once via guidance update for clearer exception policy.

rejectedObservations.observation: Suggestion to update services.yaml solely to add `.factory/init.sh` as a command alias.
rejectedObservations.reason: Non-blocking operational convenience; insufficient evidence of recurring validator failure or mission impact to apply immediately.

rejectedObservations.observation: Proposed rule requiring every new Company entity field to always be surfaced in external API contracts.
rejectedObservations.reason: Too broad as a universal rule; requires product-level intent per field and should be handled as feature-specific acceptance criteria instead.
